hero.bio: MesPensees helps you write ideas, emotions, memories, and time capsules without an account or server. Your thoughts stay on your device.

mespensees.title: MesPensees
mespensees.subtitle: Your private journal, encrypted and 100% local
mespensees.pitch: MesPensees is a mobile journaling app built for absolute privacy: no cloud, no backend, no account. Everything stays on your device.

about.title: About Crédo
about.subtitle: The creator behind MesPensees
about.body: I am Crédo, a first-year IRT / AI and Big Data student at ESGIS-TOGO, based in Lomé. I care about software development, data/AI, UI/UX, and useful applications. My personal challenge, “One Project per Day”, pushes me to learn by building.
about.extra: Outside code, I enjoy basketball and photography, two interests that sharpen my sense of rhythm, observation, and detail.

support.title: Support MesPensees
support.subtitle: Your encouragement helps keep development moving.
support.body: Payment is not automated on this website. To support the project, send any amount via Moov Money to the number below and optionally add “MesPensees support” as a note.

contact.title: Contact
contact.subtitle: Questions, suggestions, or feedback about MesPensees?
